title: Fix GH #9 (Windows BOM install), #13 (config fail-open swallow), #12 (cells reopen/unclaim), #10 (LLM-agent README)
action: #9+#13: fsutil.readJson now strips a leading UTF-8 BOM before parsing and warns to stderr (instead of silently swallowing) on malformed JSON; plugin_distribution.mjs strips the BOM PowerShell Set-Content -Encoding UTF8 writes into the preflight state file (the exact Windows-install breaker). #12: new cells.mjs unclaimCell (claimed->open) + reopenCell (capped/blocked/dropped->open, clears the recorded verify) with releaseTrace; wired through bee.mjs handlers/HANDLERS/usage-fallback and command-registry (+DA5 bijection + example execution). #10: README 'For LLM Agents' section pointing to LLM.md + curl-not-webfetch note. All lib/bee.mjs/tests mirrors kept byte-identical; release manifest regenerated.

truths: readJson strips a leading U+FEFF BOM and parses; malformed JSON returns fallback AND warns to stderr naming the file.
plugin_distribution preflight parses a BOM-prefixed plugin-state file without throwing.
cells unclaim (claimed->open) and cells reopen (capped/blocked/dropped->open, verify cleared) exist, are registered, and pass the DA5 bijection + example-execution tests.
artifacts: Full 21-suite verify green after mirror sync + manifest regenerate.
New regression test: readJson BOM+warn (test_lib); reopen/unclaim example checks (test_bee_cli).
prohibitions: No literal BOM byte left in any .mjs source (use \uFEFF).
No mirror left out of sync (test_lib_mirror + byte-identical guard).

trace.verification_evidence:
Before (red/prior behavior):
- #9: on Windows, install.ps1 wrote the preflight state file via `Set-Content -Encoding UTF8` (BOM), and plugin_distribution.mjs did a bare JSON.parse -> "Unexpected token '﻿'" -> "Distribution preflight refused" -> install aborted (tquoc229's transcript).
- #13: fsutil.readJson swallowed every JSON.parse error and returned the fallback with NO warning, so a corrupt .bee/config.json was silently indistinguishable from an absent one.
- #12: no cells reopen/unclaim verb existed (grep of cells.mjs/bee.mjs: zero hits) — a mis-claimed or capped cell could not be returned to open; requested 3x, escalated P3->P2.
After: readJson strips a leading BOM + warns to stderr on malformed JSON; plugin_distribution strips the BOM at the preflight parse; cells unclaim/reopen added and wired end-to-end.
Evidence: test_lib 335/0 (new BOM+warn regression test asserts BOM parses AND malformed warns naming the file); test_bee_cli 143/0 (reopen: dropped->open clears verify; unclaim: claimed->open releases worker; DA5 bijection + every-example-executed both green); full 21-suite chain CHAIN_EXIT:0; mirrors byte-identical; release manifest regenerated (141 files).
trace.verify_output: test_lib 335/0 (incl new readJson BOM+warn regression); test_bee_cli 143/0 (incl cells.reopen/unclaim example execution + DA5 bijection); release_manifest --check 141 match. Full 21-suite chain CHAIN_EXIT:0.
